source_pr.title: plan: change the way that we find column in group-by items in cbo phase.
source_pr.body:
We apply the projection-elimination after cbo. So when we process select count(*) from group by a order by a. The 'a' in order by has been rewritten as agg_1 by projection, so we can't retrieve this column in group-by item.
@shenli @coocood @zimulala @XuHuaiYu @winoros PTAL

symptoms: sql: "select count(*) from t group by a order by a", (plan/plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select count(*) from t group by a order by a", (plan/plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select count(*) from t group by a order by a", (plan/plan_test.go)
